title: No warning given for inferred latch
body:
Eg if I do:

```
module test(input a, output reg b);
    always @(*) begin
        if(a) b = ~b;
    end
endmodule
```
then compile with iverilog:

What I expect:

```
warning: inferred latch for reg `b`
```

What I actually see:

```
$ iverilog /tmp/test.sv 
$
```
(i.e. no warning currently given. cf eq Quartus gives such a warning)
